title: acalypha cuneata var. obovata
intro: Acalypha cuneata var. obovata, also known as the Three-angled Moses' Hand, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Acalypha cuneata var. obovata include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and poultices, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
